name: @rodge-mail/desktop
description: A hardened desktop shell for the Rodge Mail web app.
author: Bentsignal

scripts.dist: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:development-profile: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --config.mac.provisioningProfile=resources/Rodge_Mail_Desktop_Development.provisionprofile
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.package: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.package:mac:development-profile: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build && electron-builder --dir --mac --arm64 --config.mac.provisioningProfile=resources/Rodge_Mail_Desktop_Development.provisionprofile
